# GitHub is a read-only mirror

Source of truth: LastGit `lastdb:///fkanban`.

GitHub Actions workflows here are intentionally inert (`workflow_dispatch`
noops). Do not re-enable push/PR CI on GitHub. Agent merge gates run via
`.lastgit/ci.sh` on LastGit.

Public clone/browse on GitHub remains welcome; PRs opened only on GitHub are not
the merge path. See `.last-stack/pr-venue`.
